title: Lesson 54
paragraph: This lesson practices useful nouns for hobbies and free time.

words.meaning: something you enjoy doing in your free time
an activity with rules for fun
words.example: We play a board game after dinner.

words.meaning: a game or question you solve
a book or story with pictures
words.example: I read a comic on the train.

words.meaning: a funny drawing or animated show
words.example: My sister watches a cartoon on TV.

words.meaning: a story shown on a screen
words.example: We saw a movie last night.
This song is easy to sing.

words.meaning: sounds that people sing or play
words.example: We listen to music after school.

words.meaning: a picture made with a camera
words.example: Take a photo of the flowers.

words.meaning: a thing used to take photos
words.example: This camera is easy to use.
